name: UK Sanctions Against Ali Ansari
description: The United Kingdom designated [Ali Ansari](/people/ali-ansari-banker) under the Iran Sanctions Regulations (2023) for his alleged role in financially enabling the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps). The sanctions included an asset freeze, travel ban, and director disqualification. Minister Hamish Falconer described Ansari as a 'corrupt Iranian banker and businessman.' This brought the UK's total Iran-related designations to over 500 individuals and entities. The designation came one week after the [Central Bank of Iran](/orgs/central-bank-of-iran) dissolved [Ayandeh Bank](/orgs/ayandeh-bank), which Ansari had founded.

sources.source_title: UK announces sanctions against individual who funds the work of the IRGC
Why UK Is Imposing Sanctions on Founder of Ayandeh Bank - Kayhan Life

editorial_notes: Full sanctioned name: Ali Aliakbar Ansari. OCCRP and Iran International subsequently reported on his €400M European property portfolio.
